items.description: Security recipe — fail2ban, ufw firewall rules, sysctl hardening, SSH hardening

items.description: Nginx recipe — install nginx, deploy nginx.conf and security.conf, create document roots, deploy static files
items.notes: Converted: nginx install, nginx.conf + security.conf templates, service enable/start, document root dirs, index.html copy per site using split('.')[0] for folder name

items.description: Sites recipe — deploy virtual host configs, create symlinks in sites-enabled, remove default site
items.notes: Converted: site.conf.j2 template per site with vars:, symlink sites-enabled, remove default site

items.description: fail2ban jail configuration — 5 jails: DEFAULT, sshd, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, nginx-botsearch
items.notes: Converted ERB to Jinja2; added standard fail2ban jail sections for sshd, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, nginx-botsearch

items.description: Global nginx configuration — worker settings, logging, gzip, includes conf.d and sites-enabled
items.notes: Converted ERB to Jinja2; standard nginx.conf with sites-enabled include

items.notes: Converted: openssl+ca-certificates install, ssl-cert group, cert/key dirs, self-signed cert generation via shell with creates: idempotency guard

items.description: Nginx security snippet — server_tokens off, rate-limit zones, buffer limits, timeouts, global SSL settings

items.description: Molecule converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (nginx configs, SSL dirs, document roots, static files)
items.notes: Generated converge.yml: creates full /tmp/molecule_test/ filesystem tree covering nginx.conf, security.conf, sites-available (3 sites), sites-enabled symlinks, document roots + index.html per site (using split('.')[0] folder names), SSL cert/key stubs, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl 99-security.conf, and hardened sshd_config. No become, no Docker, no include_role.

items.description: Molecule verify playbook — checks nginx configs, SSL dirs/certs, document roots, static files, symlinks under /tmp/molecule_test/
items.notes: Generated verify.yml: 11 sections — (1) service facts tagged molecule-notest, (2) nginx.conf directives, (3) security.conf hardening, (4) sites-available per-site configs, (5) sites-enabled symlink targets + default absent, (6) document roots + index.html content, (7) SSL cert/key existence per site + directory existence, (8) fail2ban jail sections, (9) sysctl kernel params, (10) sshd_config PermitRootLogin/PasswordAuthentication, (11) port 80/443 + HTTP 301/HTTPS 200 checks tagged molecule-notest.
